# Use Case

Save under `docs/stories/epics/EPC-XXX/UC-<id>-<name>.md`.

Use cases are appropriate when the engagement leans IEEE/RUP-style (SRS
methodology), when flows are complex with many alternatives, or when
compliance audits expect scenario documentation. Pair with or substitute
for user stories per methodology decision.
